name: Color Bridge Builder Puzzle
description: Color Bridge Builder Puzzle is a creative physics-based puzzle game where you construct bridges using colorful blocks to guide vehicles safely across gaps. Each level introduces new colors, obstacles, and structural challenges that test your logic and planning skills. Build stable bridges, manage physics, and help vehicles reach the finish platform. With progressive levels, multiple difficulty modes, and satisfying bridge collapse physics, this game offers a fun and engaging puzzle experience.
instructions: Build bridges using colored blocks and guide vehicles safely across gaps Solve physics-based puzzles and complete increasingly challenging levels
